title: Agency Agent Frontmatter
description: Schema for YAML frontmatter in agency-agents .md files. Defines the metadata contract every agent file must satisfy.

name.description: Display name shown in tool selectors and UI.

description.description: One-sentence summary of the agent's expertise. Used in tool selectors and search.

emoji.description: Single emoji or short emoji sequence representing the agent.

color.description: Display colour for the agent. Standard named colours: cyan, blue, green, red, purple, orange, teal, indigo, pink, gold, amber, yellow, violet, rose, lime, gray, fuchsia, navy, slate, brown. Hex codes (#RRGGBB) are also accepted.

vibe.description: Personality primer line that captures the agent's tone and philosophy. Recommended but not required.

version.description: Semantic version for the agent definition (e.g. '1.0.0'). Recommended for change tracking.

date_added.description: ISO date when this agent was first added (e.g. '2026-06-18'). Recommended for lifecycle tracking.

nexus_roles.description: NEXUS pipeline phases this agent participates in. Used by the orchestration layer for agent discovery.

depends_on.description: Agent IDs that this agent logically depends on. The install tool may warn if a dependency is missing.
